title: Pycreus rubriglumosus
taxonomy: Pycreus rubriglumosus is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. It belongs to the genus Pycreus, which consists of various types of sedges found in tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Pycreus rubriglumosus includes the kingdom Plantae, the clade Angiosperms, and the clade Monocots, among other classifications. As a member of the family Cyperaceae, Pycreus rubriglumosus is closely related to other sedges and rushes. Its classification is further refined at the species level due to its unique characteristics and characteristics shared with other members of the Pycreus genus.
